scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test:ci && npm run scan:secrets && npm run lint
scripts.check:syntax: node --check src/entrypoints/cli/index.mjs && node --check src/entrypoints/cli/capabilities.mjs && node --check src/entrypoints/pipeline/run-pipeline.mjs && node --check src/app/pipeline/build/pipeline.mjs && node --check src/app/pipeline/build/setup-assistant.mjs && node --check src/app/pipeline/build/user-report.mjs && node --check src/app/pipeline/build/risk-policy.mjs && node --check src/app/pipeline/build/confirmation-flow.mjs && node --check src/app/pipeline/build/capability-interaction.mjs
scripts.release:local: npm run readme:check && npm run check:syntax && npm run test:node:focused && npm run test:node:all && npm run test:python && npm run scan:secrets && git diff --check
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:node:focused && npm run test:python
scripts.test:node:focused: node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/node/siteforge-build.test.mjs tests/node/siteforge-build-hardening.test.mjs tests/node/siteforge-build-x-output-regression.test.mjs tests/node/siteforge-output-validation.test.mjs tests/node/siteforge-auto-capabilities.test.mjs tests/node/siteforge-confirmation-flow.test.mjs tests/node/siteforge-capability-interaction.test.mjs tests/node/siteforge-runtime-registry.test.mjs tests/node/siteforge-cross-site-regression.test.mjs tests/node/siteforge-x-generic-live-uncollectable.test.mjs tests/node/progress-cli-integration.test.mjs tests/node/cli-compat.test.mjs tests/node/progress-renderer.test.mjs tests/node/run-pipeline.test.mjs tests/node/site-capability-compiler-executor/compile-entrypoint.test.mjs tests/node/site-capability-compiler-executor/planner-integration.test.mjs tests/node/generate-skill.test.mjs tests/node/skill-coverage-regression-gate.test.mjs tests/node/architecture-import-rules.test.mjs tests/node/session-view.test.mjs tests/node/social-auth-import.test.mjs tests/node/cdp-client.test.mjs tests/node/test-coverage-regression.test.mjs
